obsolete_previous_timing_rule: previous implementation applied the first activation only after the triggering action; corrected so triggering damage receives the buff.
activation_timing: applies before triggering action damage is calculated; current simulator uses same_action_aggregate_approximation so the whole triggering action receives the buff
implementation_note: The runtime buff consumes emitted mechanic event tags and generic buff fields. No Aemeath-specific damage formula branch is used.
